/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ascii_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ascii_tests.dir/tests/test_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ascii_tests.dir/tests/math/mathTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ascii_tests.dir/tests/renderer/rendererTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ascii_tests.dir/src/math/vec2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ascii_tests.dir/src/math/vec3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ascii_tests.dir/src/math/mat2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ascii_tests.dir/src/math/mat3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ascii_tests.dir/src/framebuffer/framebuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ascii_tests.dir/src/renderer/renderer.cpp.o -o bin/ascii_tests
